facts: Evida now has filled scope, PRD, architecture, domain, data and API documents.
The starter repo contains a Node-based app/API/domain vertical slice.
The implemented workflow covers matter, documents, facts, draft, verification, review and export.
API role checks now block unauthorized commands.
Endringer i utkast etter godkjenning ugyldiggjør eksportklar status.
Repository has been reorganized into a root-level monorepo.
All project documentation has been moved under docs/.
Fase 13-20 er implementert som testbare prod-grade kontrollflater.
Security, privacy, observability, admin/config, integrations, quality, beta-readiness og production-readiness er dekket av moduler og tester.
assumptions: The first production-grade foundation can use an in-memory runtime while persistence contracts are stabilized.
External OCR, AI, auth and artifact providers remain behind future provider adapters.
ambiguity_flags: Owner, CTO/technical lead and product lead are still TBD.
Final production hosting, auth provider and database provider are not locked.

summary.short_summary: Fase 1-12-grunnmuren er implementert som en testet vertikal flyt.
summary.technical_summary: Node-app med REST-API, domenetjenester, UI-shell, audit-hendelser og gate-tester.
summary.user_visible_summary: Evida kan demonstrere en verifisert flyt fra sak til eksport lokalt.

locked_decisions: Use modular monolith as initial architecture.
Treat source refs, verification, review and audit as first-class domain concepts.

causal_bridge.symptom: Folder contained templates but no buildable product code.
causal_bridge.current_hypothesis: A tested vertical slice is the fastest safe bridge from planning to implementation.
causal_bridge.root_cause_candidate: Implementation repo had only placeholder folders.

signals: API authorization smoke check passed: health=200 denied=403 allowed=201
Monorepo root npm run smoke passed
Prod-grade API-verifikasjon passerte: health=200, readiness=klar_for_kontrollert_beta, integrations=delvis, observability=frisk

action_layer.chosen_strategy: Build a tested vertical slice before broad expansion.
action_layer.chosen_action: Implement repo baseline and workflow gates.
action_layer.recommended_next_action: Replace in-memory runtime with database-backed repositories and auth when moving beyond local foundation.
action_layer.fallback_action: Keep local vertical slice as reference implementation if provider/database choices change.

rollback_path.rollback_instruction: Revert files changed in this task or reset before first commit.

execution_contract.next_action_instruction: Review monorepo foundation and choose production provider/database/auth stack.
execution_contract.success_condition_for_next_action: Stakeholders accept foundation and approve next production hardening step.
execution_contract.verification_for_next_action: npm test, npm run smoke and browser verification are passing.

repo_health.structure_fit: Repo root now has monorepo-style app, package, test, script and docs boundaries.
repo_health.ownership_fit: Domain gates live in packages/domain; web/server are separate.
follow_up_required: replace in-memory store with production persistence
replace local auth header with OIDC/authenticated claims
connect real OCR, AI, storage and export providers
